subcodes.first_line: O ye who draw nigh unto the Court of the All-Glorious! Your letter hath arrived, and the page enclosed therein brought the utmost joy [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای مقربان درگاه کبریاء نامه شما رسید ورقه که در جوف بود بسیار سبب سرور گردید
subcodes.subjects: @service to others; to the Cause of God, @power; greatness; centrality of the Covenant, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @generosity [kirama]
